title: Hadoop MapReduce Committer Stage Directory
description: The 'lib/output/committer' directory manages Hadoop MapReduce's commit protocol, ensuring data consistency. It contains 'manifest' subdirectory with files like 'AbstractJobOrTaskStage.java' and 'JobOrTaskStage.java' defining stages. 'LoadManifestsStage.java' processes task manifests, exemplifying a layered architecture. This directory showcases a modular design, with each component collaborating to maintain commit protocol integrity.
